description: Start/end timestamps of the selected Copper stage for a well, from merged_copper_stage_index_v1.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS start_time, CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS end_time FROM featurestore:merged_copper_stage_index_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND copper_stage_num = :stage_num ORDER BY stage_start_ts LIMIT 1) q
